description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [0]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_ae4f1146(I):
    x1 = objects(I, F, F, T)
    x2 = rbind(colorcount, ONE)
    x3 = argmax(x1, x2)
    O = subgrid(x3, I)
    return O
